data.title: Rural King partners with Joey Chestnut to launch National Popcorn Day tradition, targeting 2027 championship.
data.description: In Terre Haute, Indiana on January 19, 2026, Rural King, a retailer focusing on rural living, and competitive eating legend Joey Chestnut revealed a fresh collaboration, centered on celebrating National Popcorn Day. The partnership was unveiled during a special event at Rural King in which they showcased their plans for the upcoming year.

data.title: ETH price still bullish above $3,000, even after rejection at $3,400. Data hints at sustained recovery if key support holds.
data.description: Even though Ethereum was unable to maintain its price above $3,400, analysis indicated that there is potential for ETH to experience a gradual recovery in the coming weeks, contingent upon a crucial support level remaining intact.

data.title: Solana's (SOL) PropAMMs challenge DEX liquidity with predictive price feeds, offering on-chain efficiency. Learn more about these controversial tools.
data.description: Unique Automated Market Makers (AMMs) utilize anticipatory price data to compete with centralized exchanges in terms of efficiency directly on the blockchain. These AMMs operate by forecasting price movements to execute trades effectively. This innovative approach has garnered attention, with some questioning its legitimacy. By leveraging predictive models, these AMMs have demonstrated their ability to streamline trading processes and achieve comparable levels of efficiency to traditional exchanges.

data.title: Copperhead Resources Inc. (CSE: CUH) plans to change its focus to subsea mineral exploration and change its name to Deep Sea Minerals Corp.
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia - On January 19, 2026, Copperhead Resources Inc. (CSE: CUH) (OTCPK: CUHRF) (FSE: X45) announced plans to shift its focus to subsea critical mineral exploration and development pending final approval from the Canadian Securities Exchange and Company shareholders. This move, outlined in the Company's CSE Form 2A Listing Statement, involves a proposed Change of Business. Additionally, the Company looks to rebrand itself as "Deep Sea Minerals Corp." pending approval from the CSE and shareholders.

data.title: Underactive Bladder Syndrome market to grow at 22.1% CAGR from 2025-2034 due to aging population and rising neurogenic conditions.
data.description: The market for underactive bladder syndrome is projected to experience consistent growth due to factors such as the aging worldwide population and the increasing incidence of neurogenic and chronic illnesses impacting bladder function. The rise in awareness and advancements in diagnostic tools are aiding in the detection of cases that were previously undiagnosed.

data.title: Origin Digital achieves Microsoft Advanced Specialization for AI Platform on Azure, showcasing expertise in delivering AI solutions. Chicago, Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: A significant achievement that highlights extensive proficiency in providing advanced AI solutions on Microsoft Azure was announced by Origin Digital on January 19, 2026. The accomplishment entails the attainment of the Microsoft Advanced Specialization for AI Platform on Microsoft Azure, showcasing their expertise in this field. This designation reaffirms Origin Digital's commitment to delivering enterprise-grade AI solutions.

data.title: BC Natural Resources Forum excludes Kitsault Energy President from causing concerns; event claims to be nonpartisan.
data.description: In Washington, the BC Natural Resources Forum (BCNRF) brings together energy leaders from public and private sectors in a nonpartisan platform. The forum serves as a hub for discussing the latest news, trends, and opportunities in the resource sector in British Columbia and Canada. Recently, Krishnan Suthanthiran, President and Founder of Kitsault Energy, expressed alarm as his request to address the forum was rejected. Kitsault Energy, a significant player in the sector, was at the center of this controversy.

data.title: Glass Lewis recommends New Gold shareholders vote "FOR" plan with Coeur Mining. Coeur Mining shareholders also get "FOR" recommendations on all proposals. TSX: NGD, NYSE: NGD.
data.description: Shareholders of Coeur Mining have received "FOR" recommendations on all proposals. New Gold Inc. has announced that leading proxy advisory firm Glass, Lewis & Co. LLC has separately recommended the same. New Gold Inc. is listed as (TSX: NGD) and (NYSE: NGD). The news was disclosed on January 19, 2026, in Toronto.

data.title: Company King Copper Discovery has closed a financing round worth $15M.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has reached 5.7%, which is the highest it has been in the past 20 years. This increase equates to approximately 220 million people across the world being unemployed. The youth employment rate has also been affected, with 13.1% of young people currently unemployed. The report emphasized the urgent need for government intervention and policies to address this escalating issue.

data.title: Brompton Lifeco Split Corp. reveals Class A share split and boost in total distributions.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. The report stated that the country added 250,000 new jobs in the past month. This increase was primarily seen in the retail, construction, and healthcare sectors. Economists predict that the job market will continue to improve in the upcoming months, with a projected decrease in the overall unemployment rate to 3.5% by the end of the year. This positive trend has been attributed to the growth in consumer spending and confidence in the economy.

data.title: Bitcoin is standing strong at $92,000, yet uncertainties loom surrounding ETF outflows and global tensions. Will investors seize the opportunity?
data.description: The current value of Bitcoin remains steady above $92,000, however, the outflow of spot ETFs and increasing geopolitical tensions may pose a risk to its resistance. The potential weakening in resistance has raised concerns among traders. The question remains whether traders will take advantage of a potential dip in the market to increase their positions.

data.title: Constellation Software Inc. resets interest rate for Debentures to 8.6% per annum on March 31, 2026 based on CPI change.
data.description: The company Constellation Software Inc. (TSX: CSU, TSX: CSU.DB) disclosed that the interest rate for its unsecured subordinated floating rate debentures, Series 1, will be adjusted to 8.6% per annum starting on March 31, 2026. This new rate is calculated as the annual average percentage change in the "All-items Consumer Price Index" reported by Statistics Canada over the 12 months concluding on December 31, 2025, plus 6.5%. The revised rate will be applicable for the interest payment due on June 30, 2026.
